title: archidendron glabrum
intro: Archidendron glabrum, also known as the smooth tree or kepayang, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Archidendron glabrum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive problems, as well as its ability to support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's seeds, leaves, and bark can be used to make decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are then used to treat a range of health conditions.
